first_run.rationale: The score is identical, and the reasoning in both evaluations is substantively the same. Both versions correctly identify the same fundamental mismatch between the candidate's software engineering background and the hardware-specific requirements of the role. The minor differences in wording and emphasis are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and are not linked to the change in location from Berlin to Bangalore.
